tools.name: cupy/cupy
tools.description: NumPy & SciPy for GPU CuPy : NumPy & SciPy for GPU Website | Install | Tutorial | Examples | Documentation | API Reference | Forum CuPy is a NumPy/SciPy-compatible array library for GPU-accelerated computing with Python.
